额定条件安装铝法兰 305x305x13mm
温度40℃环境下外壳测温环温升60K

环境条件Temperafure-20℃~40℃
环境条件HumidityBelow 90%RH (No dewing)
环境条件EnvironmentFar away active gas, combustible gas, oil drop, ash.
环境条件Installafion altitudeUP TO 1000m:rated power, above 1000m:1.5% power decreasing per 100m,max.4000m
